Issue: Tests are installed as a package causing import conflicts in downstream projects with their own local tests folder
Decision: Exclude tests directory from MANIFEST.in and setup.py to prevent installation as a package
Rationale: To resolve import conflicts in downstream projects and restore expected import resolution for downstream users
Author: ffvogmv
Description: MONAI tests directory and its subfolders
Justification: The issue pertains to packaging configuration (setup.py and MANIFEST.in) and import resolution, which is an environment/setup concern rather than a specific ML lifecycle stage. No ML-related keywords or artifacts are mentioned.
